ads.author: Laura Little Wilson
ads.title: Chinese Hand-carved Antique Cinnabar Brush Bowl
ads.description: Beautiful Chinese Antique Hand Carved Floral Design Lacquered Cinnabar Brush Bowl with Carved Wooden Rosewood Base Vintage/Antique Chinese Cinnabar lacquered hand crafted around the early 1900's possibly older. It is Carved Lacquered Cinnabar over Brass with Bright Blue Enamel Over Brass inside the Bowl and on the bottom. The carving is beautifully detailed with a Peony and Figural design. Lacquer is the resin (or sap) of a family of trees (rhus verniciflua) found throughout southern China. It is an amazing material that hardens when exposed to oxygen and becomes a natural plastic that is resistant to water and can withstand heat and certain acids. Carved lacquer, which is predominantly red, is often known as "cinnabar" lacquer, a reference to the use of this powdered mercury sulphide as the primary colorant. In the carved-lacquer technique, multiple layers (often thirty or thirty-five, but at times up to two hundred) are applied onto a substructure in the shape of a box or dish, exposed to air and dried, and carved to create scenic and lush motifs. This Beautiful Piece is in EXCELLENT Condition for it’s age, the gloss of the glaze is perfectly intact and there is zero damage to either the interior or exterior workmanship; This piece is museum quality. The lip and bottom stand are trimmed in brass that has developed a lovely patina; the brass rim, with bright brilliant blue enamel on the inside of the Bowl and on the bottom with a Hand Carved Wooden Rosewood Base. This Beautiful Piece measures approx. 2" Tall (without the wooden base) x 4 3/4" Wide(at the widest point). The Wooden Base measures approx. 1 1/2" Tall x 3 1/4" Diam. It weighs with the base 11 oz. An exquisite piece to add to your collection.

ads.author: Michael Bucholtz
ads.title: Golden Tee Tournament Edition Arcade Machine – Original Cabinet tested fully working
ads.description: Fully tested and working. Golden Tee Tournament Edition arcade machine by Incredible Technologies. Original full-size arcade cabinet with trackball controls, coin door, CRT monitor, and game board still installed. Cabinet appears largely complete but has been in storage and is being sold as-is, untested. Features: Original Golden Tee Tournament Edition artwork Full-size stand-up arcade cabinet Trackball control panel Coin door and coin mechanisms present CRT monitor installed Original game board appears present inside cabinet Great restoration project or man-cave/game room piece Condition: Fully functional Cabinet has cosmetic wear, chips, and scratches

Comes with back door, and I can install new locks if needed. $325, located in Ranburne AL.

ads.title: Atari Hard Drivin upright project working needs cabinet repair no trades
ads.description: This is a project I am willing to pass on to anyone who wants to restore it. Monitor chassis recapped the tube is original with burn in on screen text and gauges only the text is noticeable during gameplay. The bad the base of the seat and cabinet need repaired or replacing so listing as a project that works and plays the switch on third gear is flaky so currently disabled in settings. No back door or monitor door on the top. No trades.
